positive: A minimalist, stylized depiction of a celestial river flowing through a futuristic, glowing cityscape. The river is formed by luminous constellations and abstract geometric liquid flows, contrasting sharply against deep indigo and sapphire blues. The architecture features clean, sweeping curves and exposed neon accents (cyan, magenta, electric green). The composition is highly symmetrical, with the central river acting as the main diagonal element. Focus on strong silhouettes and negative space. Style is 'synthwave ethereal' with a graphic novel aesthetic. Cinematic lighting, high contrast, crisp edges, vector-illustration quality, perfect for screen printing or embroidery.
negative: blurry, low-detail, grainy, artifacts, noise, text, watermark, logo, signature, extra limbs, malformed hands, bad anatomy, copyright, traceable, solid color background, photorealism
